title: Unify Projects/SubDAOs card typography and add new TeleMeetUp image

requirements.summary: Unify all project card description typography to brighter white text with consistent font size/style across all cards (including bullet lists) on ProjectsPage.
acceptanceCriteria: On frontend/src/pages/ProjectsPage.tsx, no project card description text renders using muted gray classes (e.g., text-gray-400) or differing font-size classes between cards; description content uses a consistent font size and style across every card.
All project description text (including TeleMeetUp & TMU-Notes bullets and Social Edification bullets) renders in white.
Only styling for text/typography in the project cards is changed; card order, buttons, links, and layout behavior remain unchanged.

file_operations.description: Update project card description typography only: remove muted/gray text classes from CardDescription and all description/bullet render paths (including Social Edification and TeleMeetUp & TMU-Notes) and enforce a single consistent text color (white) and a single consistent font size/style across all description content, without changing layout, ordering, links, buttons, or other non-typography styling.

requirements.summary: Add a new generated TeleMeetUp & TMU-Notes image asset and point the TeleMeetUp card to it on ProjectsPage.
acceptanceCriteria: A new generated image file exists under frontend/public/assets/generated with the specified filename and dimensions.
The TeleMeetUp & TMU-Notes card displays the new image on the Projects/SubDAOs page.
No other project card images are changed.

file_operations.description: Add the new generated image asset: Bright modern virtual meeting illustration with a video conferencing grid showing multiple participants on screen, plus speech bubbles and translation symbols, professional atmosphere.

Update the TeleMeetUp & TMU-Notes project's imageUrl to reference the new generated asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/telemeetup-tmu-notes-project.dim_400x250.png, leaving all other project card images unchanged.
